text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list:
Make sure to stay focused when we're back at
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Of course. But before that, I presume that you
have accumulated fatigue during this long stay
away from home.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I will show my appreciation by giving
you a foot massage while we ride the bus.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am confident in my abilities. I mastered the
technique after reading about it in a magazine
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am also confident in my grip and finger strength.
Just the other day, I was able to crush an apple
with one hand.
I tell her it's truly fine and politely decline again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for the bus to depart. I'll see you
later.

I see Mihono Bourbon off as she gets onto the
bus.
Rice Shower slowly approaches, covered in mud.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I did... everything I could... this summer... I won't
fall behind...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need to change, and fast!
And so, summer draws to a close.
